message:
chore: add .gitignore pattern for .rch-target-* build artifact directories

Add .rch-target-*/ glob to catch variant build directories like
.rch-target-release-fix/ that appear during remote compilation
troubleshooting and keep showing up as untracked.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -74,5 +74,6 @@ storage.sqlite3-*
 # Remote compilation helper deploy/build artifacts
 .rch-deploy-root/
 .rch-target/
+.rch-target-*/
 rch-bin/
 rch-install/
